seo.title: Research | Open Frontier
seo.description: Research, evaluations, and safety methods behind dependable AI systems.

hero.title: We treat capability and safety as one engineering problem.
hero.subtitle: Our research pipeline aligns model improvements with practical guardrails, evaluations, and deployment behavior.

items.title: Intent-faithful behavior
items.description: Develop methods that preserve user intent while rejecting unsafe or manipulative trajectories.

items.title: Task-grounded benchmarks
items.description: Measure useful quality on realistic, multi-step workflows rather than narrow synthetic tasks.

items.title: Mechanistic insight
items.description: Analyze internal behaviors to detect brittle strategies and improve model robustness.

items.title: Adversarial stress tests
items.description: Probe edge-case prompts and tool interactions to identify failure modes before release.

items.title: Inference reliability
items.description: Improve serving consistency under latency constraints and dynamic production workloads.

items.title: Operator-in-the-loop design
items.description: Create interfaces that keep humans informed and in control during critical decisions.

sections.heading: How we work
paragraphs: Research projects are scoped with explicit deployment assumptions, evaluation design, and clear failure criteria from day one.
Each milestone includes paired outputs: capability gains and corresponding safety constraints, then a deployment playbook for practitioners.
This reduces the gap between lab results and production outcomes, especially for enterprise and regulated domains.

sections.quote: Reliability is not a nice-to-have property. It is the product.
sections.author: Mina Park
